content.text: All 12 tests pass. Now the runner script and workflow.

input.content:
# CLI runner for the SecretRotationValidator. Wraps the module and translates
# the PassThru result into a process exit code so CI jobs can fail when a
# secret is overdue for rotation.

[CmdletBinding()]
param(
    [Parameter(Mandatory)] [string] $ConfigPath,
    [int] $WarningDays = 7,
    [ValidateSet('json','markdown')] [string] $Format = 'markdown',
    [string] $OutputPath,
    [string] $NowOverride,        # ISO date, used to make CI runs deterministic
    [switch] $FailOnExpired
)

. "$PSScriptRoot/SecretRotationValidator.ps1"

$now = if ($NowOverride) { [datetime]::Parse($NowOverride) } else { Get-Date }

$result = Invoke-SecretRotationValidatorCli `
    -ConfigPath $ConfigPath `
    -WarningDays $WarningDays `
    -Format $Format `
    -Now $now `
    -PassThru

if ($OutputPath) {
    $result.Output | Set-Content -Path $OutputPath -Encoding utf8
}
Write-Output $result.Output

if ($FailOnExpired -and $result.HasExpired) {
    Write-Error "One or more secrets are expired and require rotation."
    exit 2
}
exit 0

# CLI runner for the SecretRotationValidator. Wraps the module and translates
# the PassThru result into a process exit code so CI jobs can fail when a
# secret is overdue for rotation.

[CmdletBinding()]
param(
    [Parameter(Mandatory)] [string] $ConfigPath,
    [int] $WarningDays = 7,
    [ValidateSet('json','markdown')] [string] $Format = 'markdown',
    [string] $OutputPath,
    [string] $NowOverride,        # ISO date, used to make CI runs deterministic
    [switch] $FailOnExpired
)

. "$PSScriptRoot/SecretRotationValidator.ps1"

$now = if ($NowOverride) { [datetime]::Parse($NowOverride) } else { Get-Date }

$result = Invoke-SecretRotationValidatorCli `
    -ConfigPath $ConfigPath `
    -WarningDays $WarningDays `
    -Format $Format `
    -Now $now `
    -PassThru

if ($OutputPath) {
    $result.Output | Set-Content -Path $OutputPath -Encoding utf8
}
Write-Output $result.Output

if ($FailOnExpired -and $result.HasExpired) {
    Write-Error "One or more secrets are expired and require rotation."
    exit 2
}
exit 0

input.content:
name: Secret Rotation Validator

on:
  push:
  pull_request:
  schedule:
    - cron: '0 9 * * 1'   # weekly on Monday 09:00 UTC
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      warning_days:
        description: Days ahead of expiry to warn
        required: false
        default: '7'
      format:
        description: Output format (json or markdown)
        required: false
        default: markdown

permissions:
  contents: read

env:
  CONFIG_PATH: fixtures/secrets.json
  NOW_OVERRIDE: '2026-05-07'
  WARNING_DAYS: '7'

jobs:
  test:
    name: Pester unit tests
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Run Pester tests
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          $cfg = New-PesterConfiguration
          $cfg.Run.Path = './SecretRotationValidator.Tests.ps1'
          $cfg.Run.Exit = $true
          $cfg.Output.Verbosity = 'Detailed'
          Invoke-Pester -Configuration $cfg

  validate:
    name: Generate rotation report
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: test
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Run validator (markdown)
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          ./Invoke-Validator.ps1 `
            -ConfigPath $env:CONFIG_PATH `
            -WarningDays ([int]$env:WARNING_DAYS) `
            -Format markdown `
            -NowOverride $env:NOW_OVERRIDE `
            -OutputPath rotation-report.md
      - name: Run validator (json)
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          ./Invoke-Validator.ps1 `
            -ConfigPath $env:CONFIG_PATH `
            -WarningDays ([int]$env:WARNING_DAYS) `
            -Format json `
            -NowOverride $env:NOW_OVERRIDE `
            -OutputPath rotation-report.json
      - name: Show report
        shell: pwsh
        run: |
          Write-Host '----- MARKDOWN REPORT -----'
          Get-Content rotation-report.md
          Write-Host '----- JSON REPORT -----'
          Get-Content rotation-report.json

Done. Summary:

- **`SecretRotationValidator.ps1`** — pure functions: `Get-SecretStatus` (classifies expired/warning/ok), `Invoke-SecretRotationReport` (groups + JSON or markdown output), `Invoke-SecretRotationValidatorCli` (file-based wrapper).
- **`SecretRotationValidator.Tests.ps1`** — 12 Pester tests written test-first, all passing.
- **`Invoke-Validator.ps1`** — CLI entry with `-WarningDays`, `-Format`, `-NowOverride`, `-FailOnExpired`, `-OutputPath`.
- **`.github/workflows/secret-rotation-validator.yml`** — triggers `push`/`pull_request`/`schedule`/`workflow_dispatch`; two jobs (Pester tests → validate); passes `actionlint`.
- **`Run-ActTests.ps1`** — harness that, for 3 fixture cases (mixed / all-ok / all-expired), spins up a fresh git repo, runs `act push --rm`, asserts exit 0, "Job succeeded" on every job, `Tests Passed: 12`, and exact summary lines (e.g. `**Summary:** expired=1 warning=1 ok=1`) plus exact markdown rows like `| old-cert | expired | -96 | gw |`.
- **`act-result.txt`** — appended output from all 3 cases, all passing.

result:
Done. Summary:

- **`SecretRotationValidator.ps1`** — pure functions: `Get-SecretStatus` (classifies expired/warning/ok), `Invoke-SecretRotationReport` (groups + JSON or markdown output), `Invoke-SecretRotationValidatorCli` (file-based wrapper).
- **`SecretRotationValidator.Tests.ps1`** — 12 Pester tests written test-first, all passing.
- **`Invoke-Validator.ps1`** — CLI entry with `-WarningDays`, `-Format`, `-NowOverride`, `-FailOnExpired`, `-OutputPath`.
- **`.github/workflows/secret-rotation-validator.yml`** — triggers `push`/`pull_request`/`schedule`/`workflow_dispatch`; two jobs (Pester tests → validate); passes `actionlint`.
- **`Run-ActTests.ps1`** — harness that, for 3 fixture cases (mixed / all-ok / all-expired), spins up a fresh git repo, runs `act push --rm`, asserts exit 0, "Job succeeded" on every job, `Tests Passed: 12`, and exact summary lines (e.g. `**Summary:** expired=1 warning=1 ok=1`) plus exact markdown rows like `| old-cert | expired | -96 | gw |`.
- **`act-result.txt`** — appended output from all 3 cases, all passing.
